Polygonum robustius is a type of flowering plant, and its classification also includes the genus Polygonum and the order Caryophyllales. Within the plant kingdom, it is further classified as a dicotyledonous plant, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves. This classification helps to place Polygonum robustius within the broader taxonomy of plant life.
